ck_bookings_base_currency_amounts.name: ck_bookings_base_currency_amounts
ck_bookings_base_currency_amounts.value: ("bookings"."base_sell_amount_cents" IS NULL AND "bookings"."base_cost_amount_cents" IS NULL) OR "bookings"."base_currency" IS NOT NULL

ck_booking_items_cost_currency_amounts.name: ck_booking_items_cost_currency_amounts
ck_booking_items_cost_currency_amounts.value: ("booking_items"."unit_cost_amount_cents" IS NULL AND "booking_items"."total_cost_amount_cents" IS NULL) OR "booking_items"."cost_currency" IS NOT NULL
